product: Automate classic workspace creation with AWS IAM temporary delegation
tagline: You can now automate the creation of classic workspaces using AWS IAM temporary delegation, which grants Databricks temporary access to provision the required IAM roles, S3 bucket, access policies…
what_it_does: You can now automate the creation of classic workspaces using AWS IAM temporary delegation, which grants Databricks temporary access to provision the required IAM roles, S3 bucket, access policies, and customer managed VPC in your AWS account. This workspace creation flow replaces the AWS Quickstart template. This article describes how to create a classic workspace using automated configuration in the account console.
why_it_matters: Learn about data governance and privileges in Databricks.
